name: io.github.stagproject/sec-filings-mcp
title: SEC EDGAR Filings MCP
description: SEC EDGAR MCP: search, preview, purchase filings. x402 USDC on Polygon. xpay + Cloud Run upstream.

headers.name: key
headers.description: xpay.tools API key (query param). Get one at https://xpay.tools — append as ?key=YOUR_XPAY_KEY to the MCP URL.

remotes.description: Trial upstream: no xpay API key for search_filings and get_filing_sample. Discovery at /.well-known/*. purchase_filing uses x402 USDC on Polygon. See docs/TRY_WITHOUT_XPAY.md.
